attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; focuses on sprint launches from favorable positions (second wheel). Shows tendency to misjudge timing, going too early and fading in final meters.
team_tactics: Operates without dominant lead-out train support, relies on positioning himself in wheels of other teams' trains for sprint opportunities.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes where positioning can compensate for lack of organized team support. Exposed when sprints require sustained power through long finishing straights.
vulnerability: Sprint timing and distance judgment—launches prematurely from good positions, lacks power endurance to sustain efforts through final 50 meters when going early.
key_patterns: Consistently finds strong second-wheel positions but misjudges launch timing
Fades in final 50m after early sprint initiation
Operates without organized lead-out train support
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation insufficient to determine trajectory, but tactical execution issues evident
